zh.lifeSummary: Iowerth de Hulton是Bleythin de Hulton的兒子，於大約1145年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾普雷斯塔廷。他和Mrs Iorwerth ap Bleddyn至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1215年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃斯利享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilton
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

nameMeanings.name: Iowerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

en.lifeSummary: Iowerth de Hulton was born about 1145, in Prestatyn, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Bleythin de Hulton. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Mrs Iorwerth ap Bleddyn. He died in 1215, in Worsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Iowerth de Hulton est né environ 1145, à Prestatyn, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Bleythin de Hulton. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Mrs Iorwerth ap Bleddyn. Il est décédé en 1215, à Worsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Iowerth de Hultonは約1145年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアプレスタトインでBleythin de Hultonの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs Iorwerth ap Bleddynとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1215年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウオルスリーで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Iowerth de Hulton(은)는 대략 1145년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 플레스타틴에서 Bleythin de Hulton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs Iorwerth ap Bleddyn(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워슬리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Iowerth de Hulton родился около 1145 г. в местности престатин, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его отца звали Bleythin de Hulton. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Mrs Iorwerth ap Bleddyn. Он умер в 1215 г. в местности ворсли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
